extortion.description: J Grennan & Sons is a family owned Agri-trading business. They core business is the manufacturing and distribution, at both wholesale and retail level of Animal Feeds, Farm Fertilisers and Agricultural Seeds. The retailing and wholesaling of Agrochemicals, Farm Hardware and Farm Plastics are also integral parts of our business.We are going to upload company data soon. You will find financialdata (audit, payment details,financial reports, invoices), employees and customers information (passports, driver's license ) A bit of personal files and customers data.
